title: Amtech F1132 15 Piece titanium coated high speed steel (HSS) drill bit set
features: DURABLE: These high speed steel (HSS) drill bits are heat treated and have a titanium nitride coating performance
SIZES: The set includes assorted sizes between 1.5mm - 10mm and is provided in a handy in a plastic storage case
SIZE CAPACITY: 5 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 15pc HSS DRILL BIT SET TITANIUM NITRIDE COATED See more
